title: Watch: Russia's 'fire-and-forget' $500 Yolka drone hunter that fits in soldier's hand
summary_full: New footage shows Russian forces deploying the "Yolka" interceptor drone system in combat, a low-cost weapon designed to counter enemy reconnaissance and FPV drones. This handheld system launches a drone that autonomously tracks and engages targets via kinetic impact, offering a portable and cost-effective solution against battlefield UAVs.
